title: Transport and store chemicals
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Transport and store chemicals demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to handle and transport chemicals

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Ensure contact details for emergency services are available in transport vehicle according to workplace procedures and transport regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure contact details for emergency services are available in transport vehicle according to workplace procedures and transport regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure contact details for emergency services are available in transport vehicle according to workplace procedures and transport regulations.

pcs.text: Ensure transport vehicle complies with transport regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure transport vehicle complies with transport regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure transport vehicle complies with transport regulations.

pcs.text: Ensure containers are secured, protected and in a condition to be safely transported according to workplace procedures, manufacturer instructions, legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure containers are secured, protected and in a condition to be safely transported according to workplace procedures, manufacturer instructions, legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure containers are secured, protected and in a condition to be safely transported according to workplace procedures, manufacturer instructions, legislative and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Ensure emergency equipment and procedures are available in the vehicle according to workplace safety procedures and regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure emergency equipment and procedures are available in the vehicle according to workplace safety procedures and regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure emergency equipment and procedures are available in the vehicle according to workplace safety procedures and regulations.

pcs.text: Ensure transport arrangements comply with legislative and regulatory requirements for the transport of hazardous substances and dangerous goods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure transport arrangements comply with legislative and regulatory requirements for the transport of hazardous substances and dangerous goods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure transport arrangements comply with legislative and regulatory requirements for the transport of hazardous substances and dangerous goods.

pcs.text: Obtain and use safety data sheets (SDS) for chemicals to be transported according to health and safety in the workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and use safety data sheets (SDS) for chemicals to be transported according to health and safety in the workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and use safety data sheets (SDS) for chemicals to be transported according to health and safety in the workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements.
